name: editor-setup

{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"duration_ms":116155,"duration_api_ms":115554,"num_turns":18,"result":"Step 1 완료.

**산출물:**
- `editor.js` 생성 — `initEditors` / `getValue` / `setValue` / `switchTab` 4개 공개 API, Monaco 교체 가능한 추상 인터페이스
- `index.html` 수정 — `data-lang` → `data-tab`, `#editor-placeholder` → `#editor-container`, ES module script 추가
- `style.css` 수정 — `#editor-container textarea` 스타일(JetBrains Mono, `--bg-deep`, `--text-primary`, 16px padding, resize none) 추가

**아키텍처 준수 확인:**
- `setValue`에서 `changeCallback` 미호출 (무한루프 방지)
- `switchTab`은 DOM 조작 전용, `app.js` state 참조 없음
- `editor.js` → `app.js` 의존성 없음 (방향 준수)","stop_reason":"end_turn","session_id":"84a50d2d-df3e-4c5d-a621-5d5659c76158","total_cost_usd":0.38045115,"usage":{"input_tokens":17,"cache_creation_input_tokens":29679,"cache_read_input_tokens":539763,"output_tokens":7145,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":29679,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[{"input_tokens":1,"output_tokens":265,"cache_read_input_tokens":41317,"cache_creation_input_tokens":358,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":358},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"modelUsage":{"claude-sonnet-4-6":{"inputTokens":17,"outputTokens":7145,"cacheReadInputTokens":539763,"cacheCreationInputTokens":29679,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":0.38045115,"contextWindow":200000,"maxOutputTokens":32000}},"permission_denials":[],"terminal_reason":"completed","fast_mode_state":"off","uuid":"1d396df3-db5a-452d-8572-02dec9358288"}
